snippet.title: Fuerza Regida - TU SANCHO (Letra/Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Subscribe and press (🔔) to join the Notification Squad and stay updated with new uploads

Follow Fuerza Regida:
https://www.instagram.com/fuerzaregida
https://www.tiktok.com/@fuerzaregida
https://music.apple.com/mx/artist/fuerza-regida/1275690475

Letra:

[Verso 1]
Mi niña alista tu maleta ahorita
Quiero que te pongas bonita
Ya le marqué al pinche piloto, ya dile al tonto que ya te vas
Cabrona, buena pa' mentiras
Y esa boquita me fascina
Baby, tú eres para un loco, y como este loco no hay como yo

[Verso 2]
Qué bonito chingarte en las nubes, bandida
El piloto pura verga baja la mira
Terminamos en treinta y llegamos a Ibiza, aterrizamos sin prisa
Materiales son los que tú menos pedías
Los detalles enamoraron a mi niña
Hoy te dejo una cuenta de banco en las Islas, tú date vuelo

[Interludio]
Ah-ah
Uh

[Verso 3]
Qué bonita te miras, biеn mamacita sin calzón
No le cuentes a tu amiga quе la tengo como león
Calladita te ves más bonita
Pa' mirarnos otra vez, que no lo sepa tu güey
Sin pedos te espero, peléate con tu güey
Invéntate una razón pa' que no lo haga de pedo
Ni pedo, sin pedo, ¿ya qué? (Eh, eh, eh)

[Verso 4]
Qué bonito chingarte y más rico y de noche
Un palito en el aire y privado pa' Londres
Diferentes mujeres de varios sabores
Nomás no te me aloques
Mujeriego y coqueto, tengo mil amores
De hace tiempo te busco, mas no sé ni en dónde
Si me quieres, tendrás que aguantar los rumores
Nomás no te me aloques

[Outro]
Ey
Fuerza Regida
Jajaja
¿Ah?
Jaja

Letra/Lyrics

Bling, bling, bling
Veo todo borroso por el shot que me metí
Me muevo machín, chin, chin
Tóxica y bien loca
Ya me dicen Harley Quinn (muy loca)

Ya viste mi vida rockstar
Rosa con blue, pero, uy, tú no puedes pasar
No haces nada y nunca dejas de hablar
¿Dónde estás tú? Desde arriba no te alcanzo a mirar (no te veo)

Te quedaste con las ganas (mhm)
Yo no contesto si tú me llamas (¡ups!)
Si no te gusta mi mala fama
No te va a gustar cómo soy bien caliente en la cama

Fenty mi pintura
Ábranse, perras, llegó la más dura
El próximo mes me hago la cintura
Que les valga verga, soy la que factura

Bling, bling, bling
Veo todo borroso por el shot que me metí
Me muevo machín, chin, chin
Tóxica y bien loca
Ya me dicen Harley Quinn (Harley Quinn)

Bling, bling, bling
Veo todo borroso, bien tumbado, ando bien lean
Se mueve machín, chin, chin
Si ando con la loca, siempre gasto los de a mil (muy tóxica)

Ya anda suelta en el party, revuelta
No se va de vuelta hasta que se acompleta
Nalga, teta, la combi completa
90-60, 60-90

Y anda, peca, 100 discotecas
Le bebe macizo, nunca anda seca
Te manda fiesta, nunca contesta
Más a ese vato que siempre molesta

Frente de la gente no somos nada
Si es evidente, se nota en la mirada
Me marca de repente, se monta en la cuadrada
Se hace la inocente si el novio le reclama 

Bling, bling, bling
Veo todo borroso, bien tumbado, ando bien lean
Se mueve machín, chin, chin
Si ando con la loca siempre gasto los de a mil (muy tóxica)

Bling, bling, bling
Veo todo borroso por el shot que me metí (mhm)
Me muevo machín, chin, chin
Tóxica y bien loca 
Ya me dicen Harley Quinn (Harley Quinn)

Piden que me frene, pero yo ando bien prendida
Murmuran que yo me metí las tres líneas de la Adidas
Si andas con tu compa, yo vengo con mis amigas
Ay, qué oso, se enculó y esto es pura putería (ja, ja, ja)

Ya vi que perdiste el buen gusto
Ve esa madre con la que llegaste
Qué pinche susto

No te me escondas
Que no te busco
Yo sola me compro las Dom Peri a gusto

En el avión pura Louis Vuitton
Yo soy una gata, tú eres ratón
Mi faldita alo que me hace un culón
No sabes disimular, yo vi que se te antojó

(Bling, bling, bling)
Bebé, yo fronteo, pero no peleo
Menos con cacas
Ja, ja

Yeri Mua
La Yeri Mua
La que trae los chacales por detrás

Régulo Molina
(Chin, chin, chin)
Puro rico o muerto
(Mua)
Ya te la sabes

#YeriMua #RéguloMolina #BlingBling

snippet.title: KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS Official Trailer
snippet.description:
KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS in cinemas worldwide with limited screenings from August 12. 
tickets now on sale at http://katseyewildheartsfilm.com/

Two-time GRAMMY®-nominated global girl group KATSEYE is coming to cinemas worldwide with a special theatrical release ahead of their third EP, WILD.

KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS is a captivating journey into the group's bold new era while celebrating the fans who helped make it possible. Featuring never-before-seen footage, EYEKONS fan videos, and intimate interviews from the group members, the film explores the powerful bond between KATSEYE and their global fandom. A love letter to the EYEKONS who helped build this movement, KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS reveals why this group's story is only just beginning.

From the intense pressure of Dream Academy to chart-topping viral success, audiences experience the highs, setbacks, sacrifices, and breakthrough moments that transformed KATSEYE on their path to global pop stardom. Praised by outlets including The New York Times, Vogue, Rolling Stone, and Billboard, KATSEYE has earned acclaim for their relentless dedication to their craft and electrifying live performances. As one of pop's most exciting emerging global acts, the group continues to solidify its place as a worldwide force.

From the same team that created Netflix’s POP STAR ACADEMY, KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS is produced by Interscope Films and Boardwalk Pictures, in partnership with HYBE X GEFFEN, and directed by Nadia Hallgren.

snippet.title: The Batman Part 2 - Official 'Camera Test' Teaser Trailer (2028) Robert Pattinson
snippet.description:
Don't miss the 'Camera Test' Teaser Trailer for The Batman Part 2, the crime action superhero drama distributed by Warner Bros. Get a brief look at the caped crusader in frame and ready for the next installment in his story as The Batman. The Batman Part 2 is in theaters on February 18, 2028.

The Batman Part 2 stars Robert Pattinson, Scarlett Johansson, Sebastian Stan, Colin Farrell, Andy Serkis, Jeffrey Wright, Barry Keoghan, Brian Tyree Henry, and more. The film is directed by Matt Reeves and written by Bill Finger, Bob Kane, and Matt Reeves.

The Batman Part 2 is in theaters on February 18, 2028.

snippet.title: FATAL FURY: CotW ｜ Season 3 Announcement Trailer
snippet.description:
City of the Wolves is Destined for Revenge in Season 3.
New fighter and content update every month from July 23!
-------------------------------
Destined for Revenge in Season 3.
City of the Wolves continues its evolution with monthly updates. New characters, new stages, new fervor, new fury!
 
Destined for Revenge replaces the previous overarching theme (Season 2's Legends Unleashed) as even more fighters—and their vengeance-fueled fates—descend upon South Town's sinister streets. Monthly DLC updates will help shape the competitive landscape as City of the Wolves pushes new boundaries for its player base going forward.
Season 3 will add the following DLC characters to the playable roster, with mystery fighters slated for release in October and December. Further details will be revealed in due course.
 
Season 3 Character Lineup  
- Rick Strowd (July 23, 2026)
- Duck King (August 2026)
- Kim Kaphwan (September 2026)
- Mystery character (October 2026)
- Laocorn (November 2026)
- Mystery character (December 2026)

FATAL FURY: City of the Wolves Revenge Edition (includes Season Passes 1–3)
・Price: $49.99/€49.99
・Format: Digital
Contents
Base game
- Season Pass 1 (Andy Bogard / Ken / Joe Higashi / Chun-Li / Mr. Big)
- Season Pass 2 (Kim Jae Hoon / Nightmare Geese / Blue Mary / Wolfgang Krauser / Mr. Karate / Kenshiro)
- Season Pass 3 (Rick Strowd / Duck King / Kim Kaphwan / ??? / Laocorn / ???)

snippet.title: Alphaville - Forever Young (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
» Stream Alphaville - Forever Young (Lyrics): 
🎵 listen to the best tiktok playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL8q1rV0m6tZqliEiqDrZCGkhAWRmmvjBw

» Support Alphaville:
https://www.instagram.com/alphaville.music

» Lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Let's dance in style, let's dance for a while
Heaven can wait, we're only watching the skies
Hoping for the best but expecting the worst
Are you gonna drop the bomb or not?
Let us die young or let us live forever
We don't have the power but we never say never
Sitting in a sandpit, life is a short trip
The music's for the sad man

[Pre-Chorus]
Can you imagine when this race is won?
Turn our golden faces into the sun
Praising our leaders, we're getting in tune
The music's played by the, the mad man

[Chorus]
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever, and ever
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever young

[Verse 2]
Some are like water, some are like the heat
Some are a melody and some are the beat
Sooner or later, they all will be gone
Why don't they stay young?
It's so hard to get old without a cause
I don't want to perish like a fading horse
Youth's like diamonds in the sun
And diamonds are forever

[Pre-Chorus]
So many adventures couldn't happen today
So many songs we forgot to play
So many dreams swinging out of the blue
We'll let them come true

[Chorus]
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever, and ever
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever, and ever

[Outro]
Forever young, I wanna be forever young
Do you really want to live forever? (Forever)

💖Comment "i love u" if you're reading this

#Alphaville #ForeverYoung #SyrebralVibes

Pero así es esto

Que pa' la finiquera seguido ya han de brincar

Dios siempre me cuida y mi gorrita de Elegua

Bajo perfil el chavalón y se le extraña
